children.name: ParseCommand
children.purpose: Validate and parse the command string to determine the operation type.
children.behavior: Check that command is one of 'place', 'cancel', 'track'. If invalid, return error.

acceptance_criteria.description: Valid command returns parsed_command and error=None
Invalid command returns error message and parsed_command=''

children.stop_reason: Pure validation function, no side effects

children.name: PlaceOrder
children.purpose: Execute the 'place' command: validate items, charge payment, reserve inventory, create order, send notification.
children.behavior: Sequentially call child functions for each step; if any fails, rollback previous steps.

data_operations.description: Decrement stock and increment reserved count
Create payment record with status 'pending' then 'completed'

constraints.description: All items must exist in inventory with sufficient stock
Payment must be successfully charged before order creation
If any step fails, all previous steps must be rolled back

acceptance_criteria.description: Order created with status 'confirmed' and payment charged
On failure, no side effects remain (rollback successful)

children.stop_reason: Complex multi-step operation requiring further decomposition

children.name: CancelOrder
children.purpose: Execute the 'cancel' command: verify order exists and not shipped, refund payment, restore inventory, update status.
children.behavior: Sequentially call child functions; rollback on failure.

data_operations.description: Decrement reserved count, increment stock count

constraints.description: Order must exist and not be in 'shipped' or 'cancelled' status
Payment must be refunded before inventory restoration
If any step fails, all previous steps must be rolled back

acceptance_criteria.description: On failure, no side effects remain (rollback successful)

children.stop_reason: Complex multi-step operation requiring further decomposition

children.name: TrackOrder
children.purpose: Execute the 'track' command: retrieve order status and estimated delivery time.
children.behavior: Query orders database for order_id, return status and delivery estimate.

global_vars.description: Read order status and delivery info

data_operations.description: Retrieve order status and estimated delivery time

constraints.description: Order must exist in the system

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns order status and estimated delivery time for existing orders
Returns error message for non-existent orders

children.stop_reason: Simple read-only query, no side effects

governance_notes: All children inherit parent's global_vars as read_write on orders, inventory, and payments. Each child only declares the subset it actually uses. ParseCommand and TrackOrder are pure functions with no data store access. PlaceOrder and CancelOrder are atomic operations requiring rollback capability. Constraints ensure data integrity across multi-step operations.
